metaDescription: Create a named face collection in your OpenCV-backed gallery.
heroSubtitleForm: Create a named collection to group enrolled persons.
heroSubtitleResult: A new face collection has been created in your OpenCV database.
apiRefBody: Base URL https://api.verifik.co. Send a JSON body with a display name and an optional description.
apiRefEndpointDesc: Creates a named collection to group enrolled persons for search and verification in your OpenCV-backed database.
bullet1: This demo uses createCollection from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
bullet2: Some environments may attach an id or signature block on responses; the shape above shows the core data payload.
